name: Hawaiian Fish with Thai Banana Salsa
recipeInstructions:
- Cut into 6 equal portions (see cooking basics)
Set fish on warm plates; spoon salsa alongside. Add cilantro sprigs and salt to taste.
THAI BANANA SALSA
1. Peel and halve lengthwise banana.
2. In a nonstick frying pan over high heat, brown banana in sesame oil for about 8 minutes.
3. Chop banana. Mix with raisins, cilantro, lemon peel, and Japanese chili spice.
